name: io.github.dreamingms/kael-mcp-server
title: Kael MCP Server — AI-Native Tools for Agents
description: 16 AI-native tools: web fetch, search, screenshots, HTML extraction, DNS, WHOIS, IP geo, PDF extraction, URL unshorten, JSON query, text diff, hashing, and sandboxed code execution (JS/Python/Bash). Gives agents cheap structured results from real compute instead of expensive token-heavy reasoning. Dual SSE + streamable-http transport. Free tier available.
